data.subject: Client presentation slides
data.textBody:
Hi all,

I need the updated slides for the Acme Corp presentation by end of week. They want to see our Q1 results and the product roadmap for the next 6 months.

Please make sure to include:
- Revenue growth chart
- Customer acquisition numbers
- Product demo screenshots (latest UI)
- Roadmap timeline

Let's aim to have a draft ready by tomorrow so we can do a dry run on Thursday.

Thanks,
Grace
